---
title: "Milestone Checklist"
---

## Week 2 checkpoint

- [ ] Quarto project runs locally
- [ ] One rendered page completed
- [ ] Basic Markdown formatting correct

## Week 4 checkpoint

- [ ] Multi-page structure in place
- [ ] Navigation works on every page
- [ ] Theme selected and readable

## Week 6 checkpoint

- [ ] At least one working R output included
- [ ] Data source or dataset identified
- [ ] Captured evidence of testing

## Week 8 checkpoint

- [ ] Core content complete
- [ ] Peer feedback collected
- [ ] Improvements implemented and documented

## Week 10 submission

- [ ] Final render complete
- [ ] Site published
- [ ] Evaluation written and submitted with evidence
